description: You are a DevOps engineer working on a cloud cost estimation tool at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/cloud_cost_estimator`. Fix the logic errors in the tool to resolve underestimation of storage costs and miscalculation of data transfer fees. Specifically, ensure GB are correctly converted to GiB for billing, implement cumulative tiered pricing for data transfer costs, and ensure usage in specific Availability Zones maps to the parent region's price. All existing tests must pass, and no modifications should be made to test or data files.
